name: large rolling barrel room
description: I'm in a large rolling barrel room
hints: You're inside a rolling barrel! Standing up will cause you to fall.
You can't stand in a rolling barrel. Try crawling instead.
CRAW to crawl out to the ledge. GET COMB and GET MATC before leaving.
The comb and match are both useful items. CRAW exits to the ledge over the pit (room 15).
notes: Rolling barrel room. Must CRAW to exit (standing fails). Contains comb and match - both important items. Exits to ledge over pit (room 15).
